changes: Filter pick transaction player autocomplete to the selected draft year's class only
Move draft year selector above player field in pick transaction form
Add Rookie Scale page (League Office) showing first-round contract amounts by pick and draft year
Remove TPE references from trade rules; add no-TPE statement, options-travel note, roster size and trade deadline placeholders
Add Stepien Rule and 7-year advance limit to draft pick trading rules
Add Base Year Compensation (BYC) rules for sign-and-trade salary matching
Add First Apron restriction for sign-and-trade receiving teams
Add FA signing trade restriction and touch rule to trade rules
Add minimum contract incoming salary exception to trade rules
Add tiered salary-matching rules and re-acquisition restriction to trade rules
Fix DOB off-by-one-day display bug caused by UTC vs local time parsing
FA signing player search now scoped to unrostered, unretired players
Rename /league-settings to /cap-settings; update page title and heading to match
Rename League Settings card to Cap Settings
Add League Office section to homepage (role-gated, visible to rosters/admin)
Add Cap Settings page at /cap-settings — edit cap, apron, and MLE amounts by season
Fix pre-commit hook to skip version bump on changelog-only commits
Add missing changelog entries for v0.0.3 and v0.0.4
Add About section to homepage; move Changelog, Roles & Permissions, and Data Files cards there
Remove duplicate 0.0.1 changelog entry
Add versioning system with auto-incrementing patch version on each commit
Add changelog page at /changelog with full version history
Add function index to teams/team.js for faster navigation
Add common task lookup table and architecture callouts to CLAUDE.md
